title: He Thong Uoc Hen (6 Phan)
content:
<HE THONG UOC HEN>
# LOC THANH 6 PHAN NHU GIAO DIEN

## PHAN 1: BAN CHAT & TRANG THAI
- **nature** (Ban chat): "Tinh cam"|"Bao thu"|"Giao dich"|"Ca cuoc"|"Cam ket"|"Tu nguyen"
- **currentStatus** (Trang thai): "Sap dien ra"|"Dang cho"|"Dang thuc hien"|"Hoan thanh"|"Huy bo"|"That bai"
- Quy trinh: Sap dien ra → Dang cho → Dang thuc hien → Hoan thanh | Huy bo | That bai

## PHAN 2: TIEU DE
- **title**: Tieu de ngan gon cua uoc hen (VD: "The non hen bien", "Hen ngay tai chien")

## PHAN 3: DOI TUONG
- **target**: {name, type: "npc"|"self"|"family"|"enemy"|"past_life"|"reincarnation"|"spirit"|"beast"|"demon"|"god", lifeStatus: "Alive"|"Deceased"|"Unknown", faction?}


## PHAN 4: NOI DUNG
- **oathContent**: Loi the/hua day du (noi dung chinh)
- **backgroundStory** (tuy chon): Ngu canh lich su

## PHAN 5: THOI GIAN & DIA DIEM
- **time**: "YYYY:MM:DD:HH:MM"
- **location**: Dia diem cu the
- **validDuration**: Thoi han (phut)

## PHAN 6: HAU QUA
- **fulfillmentConsequence**: Hau qua khi giu loi (thuong, tang hao cam, nhan do)
- **failureConsequence**: Hauqua khi pha loi (mat hao cam, bi truy sat, bi nguyen rua)

# CAU TRUC DU LIEU
{
  id: string,
  title: string,
  oathContent: string,
  nature: "Tinh cam"|"Bao thu"|"Giao dich"|"Ca cuoc"|"Cam ket"|"Tu nguyen",
  target: {name, type, lifeStatus, faction?},
  location: string,
  time: string,
  validDuration: number,
  currentStatus: "Sap dien ra"|"Dang cho"|"Dang thuc hien"|"Hoan thanh"|"Huy bo"|"That bai",
  fulfillmentConsequence: string,
  failureConsequence: string,
  backgroundStory?
}

# RULES
- Each agreement must have all 6 parts above
- Update `<command>` when status changes
- Update `agreementList` when create/complete/cancel agreement

title: Thiet Lap The Gioi Quan
content:
【Tong quan the gioi】
The gioi nay mang danh Van Gioi. Thoi dai hien tai la su giao thoa giua mot ky nguyen vo hoc cuc thinh va loan the giang ho; vua co su huy hoang cua cac bac vuong trieu, vua an chua song gio ngam cua vo lam. Cuong vuoc vo cung menh mang, khong phai la mot dai luc don nhat ma duoc cau tao tu vo so 'Gioi Vuc' lien ket voi nhau bang hiem son, hac hai hoac cac thong dao bi an. Trat tu ben ngoai trieu doi cuong thinh duy tri, nhung trong bong toi, cac tong mon, the gia, hao cuong dia phuong va ta phai an the cat cup mot phuong, tao nen the chan vac rac roi. Nen tang van minh lay 'Di vo vi ton' lam goc, Nho - Thich - Dao tam giao dong tu.

【Ban do The luc】
Van Gioi mang bo cuc 'Quan hung truc loc'. Cac the luc bao gom:
1. Trieu doi: Chuong khong giang son van dam, so huu hung binh va quan li, muu do tran ap di ky, thu thap tuyet hoc. Da tam nhất thong cac Gioi Vuc nhung luc bat tong tam.
2. Chinh dao Tong mon: Thieu Lam, Vo Dang, Ngha Mi, Cai Bang... de cao hiep nghia, duy tri vo lam chinh thong. Vua hop tac vua doi khang trieu doi.
3. Ta dao the luc: Ma giao, Ta tong, Hac dao... hanh su quy di, khong tu thu do, la coi nguon cua huy vu tinh phong.
4. Dia phuong The gia: Nam giu mach mau kinh te va tu binh, la ke duy tri trat tu dia phuong nhung cung san sang xet xac ke thu vi loi ich.

【He thong Canh gioi (Bat buoc tuan thu)】
He thong vo luc tuan thu nghiem ngat 'Cuu giai phan tang' thuan vo hiep, tuyet doi khong trong sang tien hiep (khong nguyen anh, khong phap thuat).
Cuu giai gom: Khai Mach Canh (1-10 trong) -> Tu Tuc Canh -> Quy Nguyen Canh -> Nghu Kinh Canh -> Hoa Cuong Canh (Moi canh gioi chia Son/Trung/Hau ky) -> Thong Huyen Canh -> Than Chieu Canh -> Phan Chan Canh -> Thien Nhan Canh.
Cao thu Thien Nhan Canh nhu 'Than minh' tai the, thoai an khong xuat hien. Cao thu Phan Chan, Than Chieu la cuc phach tran phai. Khai Mach Canh la hang tom tep moi buoc chan vao giang ho.

【... (line truncated to 2000 chars)
